global.qss: QMainWindow { background-color: #f8fafc; } QMenu { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 4px; } QMenu::item { padding: 6px 24px; } QMenu::item:selected { background-color: #eff6ff; color: #1e293b; } QMenu::separator { height: 1px; background-color: #e2e8f0; margin: 4px 8px; } QToolTip { background-color: #1e293b; color: #ffffff; border: none; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; }

splitter.qss: QSplitter::handle { background-color: #e2e8f0; } QSplitter::handle:hover { background-color: #3b82f6; } QSplitter::handle:horizontal { width: 2px; } QSplitter::handle:vertical { height: 2px; }

button-primary.qss: QPushButton { background-color: #3b82f6; color: #ffffff; border: none; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: bold; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #2563eb; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: #1d4ed8; }

button-secondary.qss: QPushButton { background-color: #ffffff; color: #334155; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #f1f5f9; border-color: #cbd5e1; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: #e2e8f0; }

input.qss: QTextEdit, QPlainTextEdit, QLineEdit { background-color: #ffffff; color: #334155; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei'; font-size: 10pt; } QTextEdit:focus, QPlainTextEdit:focus, QLineEdit:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; }

tree.qss: QTreeView { background-color: #ffffff; border: none; outline: none; } QTreeView::item { padding: 4px 8px; color: #334155; } QTreeView::item:hover { background-color: #f1f5f9; } QTreeView::item:selected { background-color: #eff6ff; color: #1e293b; } QTreeView::branch:has-siblings:!adjoins-item { border-image: none; } QTreeView::branch:!has-children:!has-siblings:adjoins-item { border-image: none; }

tab-bar.qss: QTabBar::tab { background-color: #f1f5f9; color: #64748b; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; margin-right: 2px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; } QTabBar::tab:hover { color: #334155; background-color: #e2e8f0; } QTabBar::tab:selected { color: #1e293b; background-color: #ffffff; border-bottom: 2px solid #3b82f6; } QTabBar::close-button { image: none; } QTabBar::close-button:hover { background-color: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; }

scrollbar.qss: QScrollBar:horizontal { height: 8px; background: transparent; } QScrollBar:vertical { width: 8px; background: transparent; } QScrollBar::handle { background: #cbd5e1; border-radius: 4px; min-height: 30px; } QScrollBar::handle:hover { background: #94a3b8; } QScrollBar::add-line, QScrollBar::sub-line { height: 0; width: 0; } QScrollBar::add-page, QScrollBar::sub-page { background: none; }

group-box.qss: QGroupBox { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 12px; padding: 16px; padding-top: 24px; font-weight: bold; color: #334155; } QGroupBox::title { subcontrol-origin: margin; left: 12px; padding: 0 6px; }

table.qss: QTableWidget { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; gridline-color: #f1f5f9; } QTableWidget::item { padding: 6px 12px; color: #334155; } QTableWidget::item:selected { background-color: #eff6ff; color: #1e293b; } QHeaderView::section { background-color: #f8fafc; color: #64748b; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 8px 12px; font-weight: bold; }
